'''Bakura-7''', also simply known as '''Planet 7''',<ref name="TAB-SB">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> was the seventh [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Bakura system/Legends|Bakura system]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
